segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yep, that's me. Are you David?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, that's the address. Thanks for waiting. I have two suitcases, so I'm moving a little slow.

segments.speaker: Driver
segments.text: No worries. Want to put them in the trunk?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, please. I can lift this one, but the bigger one is pretty heavy.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Just to confirm, the address ends in 42, right?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. When we get there, could you drop me near the front entrance if possible?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Appreciate it. I just landed, so I'm trying to keep things simple.
